title: Privacy
content:
On the Agenda

Privacy

Privacy

Welcome to the Doğuş University web page. This website you are accessing belongs to Doğuş University, and Doğuş University is the owner of all content contained herein. All content located at

www.dogus.edu.tr

is protected under the Law on Intellectual and Artistic Works No. 5846, within the framework of international agreements, and by similar laws of other countries.

As both the creator and user of the intellectual and artistic works on this website, Doğuş University exercises due care and sensitivity regarding the use, protection, and development of these rights.

Content belonging to third parties, which is not owned by Doğuş University, is included on our website in compliance with applicable laws and within the framework of agreements and specific contracts.

All visitors may view and download materials located at

www.dogus.edu.tr

to a reasonable extent for non-commercial, personal use purposes.

However, copying and publishing this content online on websites belonging to other institutions or individuals, as well as systematic downloading and storage, is strictly prohibited. Legal proceedings will be initiated against the relevant individuals or institutions in the event of such an occurrence.

This privacy policy has been prepared for

www.dogus.edu.tr

and provides protection to users solely for this domain and its associated subdomains.

Doğuş University assumes no liability for websites outside of this domain or for any external sites linked within this website.

Users who consider the Doğuş University Website Privacy Policy to be insufficient or inappropriate are advised to refrain from using this website. By using the website, the Doğuş University Website Privacy Policy is deemed to have been accepted.

Personal information collected from visitors of

www.dogus.edu.tr

via forms on the site (including name, email address, country and city of residence, phone number, and other personal data) will be protected within the scope of the Law on the Protection of Personal Data. This information will not be sold, rented, or made available for use by third parties in any manner.

Our contact details for reporting violations, such as the unauthorized copying, dissemination, or reproduction of Doğuş University website content, are listed below:

WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines)

Web Accessibility Standards are outlined in the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG), which were prepared by the W3C (World Wide Web Consortium), an organization founded under the leadership of the internet's inventor, Tim Berners-Lee.

The standards defined here aim to provide solutions for the needs of individuals with disabilities (including visual, auditory, physical, speech, cognitive, language, learning, and neurological disabilities).

While the guidelines may not fully address the needs of individuals with multiple disabilities, they enable access to web pages for a vast number of users with disabilities. Furthermore, these standards ensure that websites are accessible to the elderly, children, and all other users.

There are four fundamental principles established to make a website accessible: Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, and Robust.

As Doğuş University, we have designed our website by taking into account accessibility features that provide ease of use for our visitors with disabilities.
